nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of   Wassell  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Wassell
meanings: English: variant of Wastell, a nickname from Old French wastel ‘wastel, cake or loaf made from fine-quality wheat flour’ (a northeastern form of g(u)astel, modern French gâteau). Alternatively, a variant of Westall .

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Wassel was born about 1099, in Wassel, Hanover, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, her father, Graf Bernhard I Von Wassel, was 23 and her mother, Gräfin Edler von Depenau, was 15. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I. She died from 8 January 1133 to 7 January 1137.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Wassel um 1099 in Wassel, Landkreis Hannover, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Bernhard I Von Wassel 23 und ihre Mutter Gräfin Edler von Depenau 15. Sie hatte mit Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb von 8. Januar 1133 bis 7. Januar 1137.

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Wassel(이)가 대략 1099년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 랜드크레이스 해노버 와셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Bernhard I Von Wassel(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gräfin Edler von Depenau(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1133년 1월 8일부터 1137년 1월 7일까지 사망했다.
